            "isSignature": true,

            "text": "export default function ReceiptOcrPage() {"

          {
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "  const showMergedEditor = exportMode === \"merged\" \u0026\u0026 hasAnySuccessResult;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "  const showToast = (message: string) =\u003e {"

            "text": "    setToast(message);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256,
            "text": "    window.setTimeout(() =\u003e setToast(\"\"), 2200);"

            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259,
            "text": "  const commitAddFiles = useCallback((files: File[]) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260,
            "text": "    const newItems = files.map(newQueueFile);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "    flushSync(() =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "      setQueue((prev) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "        const next = [...prev, ...newItems];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "        setSelectedId((cur) =\u003e (cur ? cur : next[0]?.id ?? null));"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265,
            "text": "        return next;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "      });"
          },
          {

            "text": "    });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "    return newItems;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "  }, []);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "  const handleRequestAddFiles = (files: File[]) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "    if (!files.length) return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "    if (queue.length === 0) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "      commitAddFiles(files);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "      return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "    /** 尚未进行任何识别（全部为等待中）时，直接追加，不问是否只识别新增 */"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "    if (queue.every((q) =\u003e q.status === \"pending\")) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "      commitAddFiles(files);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,

            "lineNumber": 281,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "text": "  const dismissUploadDialog = useCallback(() =\u003e setPendingUploadFiles(null), []);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287,
            "text": "  useEffect(() =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288,
            "text": "    if (!pendingUploadFiles) return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "    const onKey = (e: KeyboardEvent) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290,
            "text": "      if (e.key === \"Escape\") dismissUploadDialog();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "    };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "text": "    document.addEventListener(\"keydown\", onKey);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "    return () =\u003e document.removeEventListener(\"keydown\", onKey);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "  }, [pendingUploadFiles, dismissUploadDialog]);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "const SUPPORTED_TYPES = [\"image/jpeg\", \"image/png\", \"image/webp\"];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "export default function ImageUploader({ onAddFiles, className }: ImageUploaderProps) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "  const inputRef = useRef\u003cHTMLInputElement\u003e(null);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "  const [isDragOver, setIsDragOver] = useState(false);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "  const pickFiles = (files: FileList | null) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    if (!files?.length) return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    const filtered = Array.from(files).filter((file) =\u003e SUPPORTED_TYPES.includes(file.type));"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    if (filtered.length) onAddFiles(filtered);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "  return ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    \u003csection"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "      className={&#96;card flex h-full min-h-0 min-w-0 flex-col overflow-hidden !p-3 sm:!p-4 ${className ?? \"\"}&#96;}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "    \u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "      \u003cdiv"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "        className={&#96;flex min-h-0 w-full min-w-0 flex-1 cursor-pointer flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1 overflow-hidden rounded-xl border-2 border-dashed px-2 py-3 text-center transition-colors sm:gap-1.5 sm:rounded-2xl sm:px-3 sm:py-4 ${"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "          isDragOver"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "            ? \"border-blue-500 bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-950/25\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "            : \"border-slate-300 hover:border-blue-400 dark:border-slate-500 dark:hover:border-blue-500/80\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "        }&#96;}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "        onClick={() =\u003e inputRef.current?.click()}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "        onDragOver={(event) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "          event.preventDefault();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "          setIsDragOver(true);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "        }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "        onDragLeave={() =\u003e setIsDragOver(false)}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "        onDrop={(event) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "          event.preventDefault();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "          setIsDragOver(false);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "          pickFiles(event.dataTransfer.files);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "        }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "      \u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "        \u003cImagePlus className=\"h-7 w-7 shrink-0 text-blue-600 sm:h-9 sm:w-9 dark:text-blue-400\" /\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "        \u003cp className=\"min-w-0 shrink px-1 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-800 sm:text-base dark:text-slate-100\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "          上传小票图片"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "        \u003c/p\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "        \u003cp className=\"min-w-0 max-w-[18rem] shrink px-1 text-[11px] leading-snug text-slate-600 sm:text-xs sm:text-sm dark:text-slate-400\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,

          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "- 用正则 &#96;/\\{[\\s\\S]*\\}/&#96; 从返回文本中提取 JSON（防止 AI 输出多余文字）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "- 解析失败时将该小票标记为 &#96;error&#96; 状态，保留原始 AI 响应供调试"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "### 3.4 Excel 导出（services/exporter.ts）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200,
            "text": "所有 success 状态小票"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "        │"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "        ▼"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "  遍历每张小票"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "        │"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "  ┌─────▼─────┐"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "  │ 构建 Sheet │  → Sheet 名: \"超市名-MM月DD日\"（截断至31字符）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "  │           │"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "  │ 行1: 标题行 │  → [\"商品名称\", \"单价\", \"数量\", \"小计\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "  │ 行2~N: 商品 │  → 每条 ReceiptItem 对应一行"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "  │ 行N+1: 合计 │  → [\"合计\", \"\", \"\", total]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "  └─────┬─────┘"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "        │"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "  追加到 Workbook"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "        │"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "  xlsx.writeFile() → 触发浏览器下载"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "  文件名: \"小票记录_YYYY-MM-DD.xlsx\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "## 4. 数据流设计"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "### 4.1 核心流程数据流"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "用户拖拽/选择图片"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "       │"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228,
            "text": "       ▼"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "  DropZone 组件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "  验证（大小≤5MB，格式合法）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "       │"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232,
            "text": "       ▼"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "  store.addReceipts()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "text": "  生成 ReceiptData（status: 'pending'）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "  创建 Object URL 用于预览"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "       │"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "       ▼"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "  useOcrQueue Hook 监听 store"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "  检测到 pending 项目，开始队列处理"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "       │"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "       ├──► 调用 zhipuai.recognize(file, apiKey)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "       │         │"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "       │    成功  ▼  失败"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244,
            "text": "       │    store.updateReceiptData()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "       │    写入 storeName/date/items/total"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "       │    status → 'success' / 'error'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247,
            "text": "       │"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "       ▼"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "  ReviewPanel 渲染"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "  左侧: ImageViewer 显示 previewUrl"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "  右侧: ReceiptTable 渲染可编辑表格"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "       │"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "  用户编辑单元格"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "       │"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255,
            "text": "       ▼"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256,
            "text": "  store.updateReceiptItem() / updateReceiptData()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "  实时更新 Store"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258,
            "text": "       │"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259,
            "text": "  用户点击\"导出 Excel\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260,
            "text": "       │"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "       ▼"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "  exporter.exportToExcel(receipts.filter(success))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "  触发 .xlsx 文件下载"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "### 4.2 API Key 数据流"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "首次使用               后续使用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "    │                     │"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 270
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 192
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\SYSTEM_DESIGN.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.1313869059085846

          {

            "text": "            {showMergedEditor ? ("

            "lineNumber": 446,

          {

            "text": "              队列中已有图片。是否仅对本次新增的{\" \"}"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 342,
            "text": "- 局部状态仅用于 UI 临时状态（如弹窗开关、输入框焦点）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 343
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 344,
            "text": "### 6.4 Excel 生成时机"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 346,
            "text": "**选择：点击\"导出\"时按需生成**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 347,
            "text": "- 原因：用户可能多次编辑后再导出，实时生成会增加不必要的计算"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 348,
            "text": "- 导出时过滤 &#96;status === 'success'&#96; 的小票，跳过失败项"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 349
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 350,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 351
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 352,
            "text": "## 7. 错误处理策略"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 353
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 354,
            "text": "| 错误场景 | 处理方式 | 用户提示 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 355,
            "text": "|---------|---------|---------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 356,
            "text": "| API Key 未设置 | 阻止识别，打开设置弹窗 | Toast: \"请先设置 API Key\" |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 357,
            "text": "| 图片超出 5MB | 上传时拦截 | Toast: \"图片过大，请压缩后重试\" |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 358,
            "text": "| API 返回 401 | 标记 error + 提示 | Toast: \"API Key 无效，请重新设置\" |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 359,
            "text": "| API 返回 429 | 等待 2s 后自动重试（最多3次） | 缩略图显示\"重试中...\" |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 360,
            "text": "| JSON 解析失败 | 标记 error，保留原始响应 | Toast: \"识别结果解析失败，可手动输入\" |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 361,
            "text": "| 无 success 小票时导出 | 禁用导出按钮 | 按钮置灰 + Tooltip 提示 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 362
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 363,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 364
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 365,
            "text": "## 8. 部署架构（GitHub Actions）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 366
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 367,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 368,
            "text": "# .github/workflows/deploy.yml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 369,
            "text": "触发条件: push to main"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 370,
            "text": "流程:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 371,
            "text": "  1. Checkout 代码"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 372,
            "text": "  2. Setup Node.js 20"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 373,
            "text": "  3. npm ci"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 374,
            "text": "  4. npm run build  → dist/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 375,
            "text": "  5. Deploy dist/ → gh-pages 分支"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 376,
            "text": "  6. GitHub Pages 自动从 gh-pages 分支发布"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 377,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 378
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 379,
            "text": "**Vite 配置注意：**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 380,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 381,
            "text": "// vite.config.ts"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 382,
            "text": "export default defineConfig({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 383,
            "text": "  base: '/仓库名/',  // GitHub Pages 子路径部署必须配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 384,
            "text": "})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 385,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 386
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 387,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 388
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 389,
            "text": "## 9. 后续迭代扩展点"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 390
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 391,
            "text": "| Phase | 功能 | 技术方案 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 392,
            "text": "|-------|------|---------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 393,
            "text": "| Phase 2 | 历史记录持久化 | IndexedDB（Dexie.js），存储 ReceiptData（去除 File 对象，保留 Base64） |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 394,
            "text": "| Phase 3 | 消费统计图表 | Recharts，基于历史数据聚合月度/超市维度 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 395,
            "text": "| Phase 4 | 多模型支持 | 抽象 &#96;OcrProvider&#96; 接口，适配 OpenAI Vision / 百度 OCR 等 |"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 395
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 341
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\SYSTEM_DESIGN.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.10721989721059799
    },

          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 391
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 392,
            "text": "  const reRecognizeOne = async (id: string) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 393,
            "text": "    if (!effectiveApiKey.trim()) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 394,
            "text": "      showToast("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 395,
            "text": "        apiKeySourceMode === \"custom\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 396,
            "text": "          ? \"当前为自定义 API：请选择服务商并填写、保存 API Key。\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 397,
            "text": "          : \"站点默认 API 不可用，请联系管理员。\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 398,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 399,
            "text": "      return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 400,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 401,
            "text": "    const entry = queueRef.current.find((item) =\u003e item.id === id);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 402,
            "text": "    if (!entry || entry.status === \"processing\") return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 403
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 404,
            "text": "    setQueue((prev) =\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 405,
            "text": "      prev.map((item) =\u003e (item.id === id ? { ...item, status: \"processing\", errorMessage: undefined } : item))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 406,
            "text": "    );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 407,
            "text": "    try {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 408,
            "text": "      const result = await recognizeReceipt(entry.file, effectiveLlmProvider, effectiveApiKey);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 409,
            "text": "      setQueue((prev) =\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 410,
            "text": "        prev.map((item) =\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 411,
            "text": "          item.id === id ? { ...item, status: \"success\", result, errorMessage: undefined } : item"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 412,
            "text": "        )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 413,
            "text": "      );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 414,
            "text": "      showToast(\"已重新识别该图片。\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 415,
            "text": "    } catch (error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 416,
            "text": "      const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : \"识别失败\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 417,
            "text": "      setQueue((prev) =\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 418,
            "text": "        prev.map((item) =\u003e (item.id === id ? { ...item, status: \"error\", errorMessage: message } : item))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 419,
            "text": "      );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 420,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 421,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 422
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 423,
            "text": "  const exportExcel = () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 424,
            "text": "    try {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 425,
            "text": "      exportReceiptsToExcel(queue, exportMode);"
          },
          {

            "text": "      showToast(&#96;Excel 导出成功（${exportMode === \"merged\" ? \"合并汇总\" : \"分 Sheet\"}模式）。&#96;);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 427,

          {

          {
            "lineNumber": 429,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 430,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 431
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 432,
            "text": "  return ("
          },
          {

            "text": "}"
          }

## 原因

松手后“回到中间”不是 CSS 偶然行为，而是 **`ReceiptOcrPage.tsx` 里一段 `useEffect` 刻意在拖动结束瞬间把平移清零**：

```185:194:src/pages/ReceiptOcrPage.tsx
// 已删除的逻辑大意：
// lightboxWasDraggingRef 为 true 且 lightboxDragging 变为 false 时
// setLightboxPan({ x: 0, y: 0 })
```

## 修改

1. **删掉**上述 `useEffect` 以及仅服务于它的 `lightboxWasDraggingRef`。  
2. **提示文案**：去掉「松手归中」，改为「拖动平移 · 双击重置 · Esc 关闭」。

关闭灯箱（`closeLightbox`）时仍会重置缩放与平移，行为与之前一致；**双击**仍可把缩放和平移重置为默认。

---

**涉及文件：** `src/pages/ReceiptOcrPage.tsx`
